content:
Character: Oliver Grant
Perception: Oliver has that earnest, slightly rumpled Midwestern solidity — not flashy but the kind of face you'd trust with your taxes, which is literally what he does. He's sharp in a grinding, methodical way — not brilliant but relentless, which in finance often matters more. Studying for the CFA like his life depends on it, and maybe it does. I offered him some contacts at JPMorgan and Lazard; he was grateful in a way that was almost painful to watch. He sees me as a generous mentor figure. I see him as a potential founding analyst if my firm materializes. He doesn't know that part yet. Honest kid. Useful.

I see him as a potential founding analyst if my firm materializes. He doesn't know that part yet. Honest kid. Useful.
